report.summary: Community cycle completed: Drafted 4 tweets (#235-238) covering Q1 close recap, CLARITY Act stablecoin deal thread, 51-day fear streak record, and options expiry aftermath. Newsletter v39 full weekly digest drafted for Thu Apr 3. Created SVG social card: Q1 2026 Great Divergence (1200x630, dual-column price action vs accumulation). Discord/TG Sunday community update drafted. 942 pages published, 238 total tweets drafted, 54+ SVG cards created.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #235: Q1 Closing Market Recap — BTC $66,350 (-24.6% YTD), ETH $1,985 (-60%), SOL $83 (-72%). Worst Q1 since 2022 but 270K BTC whale accumulation, 5.88% exchange supply ATL, SEC commodity ruling, CLARITY Act deal. Links to fear-greed-index. Scheduled: Sun Mar 29, 4PM ET.

Tweet #236: CLARITY Act Progress Thread (3 parts) — Tillis & Alsobrooks 'agreement in principle' with White House on stablecoin yield. Stablecoin yield legally defined, DeFi lending clarity, banks can offer crypto yield. NC Bitcoin Reserve Act introduced (10% public funds → BTC). Links to crypto-regulations-2026-guide. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 12PM ET.

Tweet #237: 51 Days of Extreme Fear — Longest streak in crypto history. Post-FTX +94%, COVID +1,180%, crypto winter +306%. Pattern: extreme fear at this duration has never not preceded major recovery. Links to fear-greed-index. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 3PM ET.

Tweet #238: Options Expiry Aftermath — $14.16B settled (largest of 2026), $451M liquidated, 122K traders wiped, max pain $75K vs $66K settle. Post-expiry volatility resolves in 5-7 days. Next expiry Apr 25. Links to options-calculator. Scheduled: Tue Mar 31, 10AM ET.
Discord/TG: Sunday Community Update — Full market snapshot, 942 pages milestone, Q1 close recap, regulatory wins (CLARITY Act + NC Reserve Act), accumulation narrative, next week content preview.

Newsletter v39: Full weekly digest — Q1 close analysis, $14.16B options expiry, 51-day fear record, CLARITY Act progress, NC Bitcoin Reserve Act, 942 pages live, top content highlights. Send: Thu Apr 3, 10AM ET.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Q1 2026 Great Divergence (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism dual-column design. Left column 'THE PRICE ACTION' (red): BTC $66,350 (-24.6% YTD), ETH $1,985 (-60%), SOL $83 (-72%), F&G 12/100 (51-day record), -$80B market cap, $14.16B options expiry, $451M liquidations. Right column 'THE ACCUMULATION' (green): 270K BTC whales (30d), 5.88% exchange supply (ATL), 16 tokens = commodities, CLARITY Act deal reached, NC Reserve Act (10% public funds → BTC). Purple historical comparison bar: post-FTX +94%, COVID +1,180%, 2018 +306%. Footer with market cap, oil, liquidations, fear streak, 942 pages, 238 tweets. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-29-social-card-q1-close-divergence.svg
